nativePolicy: href is required and disabled-link semantics are absent from the public type.
External links receive noopener and noreferrer while preserving consumer rel tokens.
Current state has text weight and decoration in addition to color.

compositionPolicy.familySignature: Ink typography, Action Green underlines, and the shared Violet focus seam keep navigation in the Living Workbench family.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: externalContext adds visible and announced new-context text only for external links; false removes the text, slot, and accessible-name contribution.
